mapper.select: SELECT notice_no AS noticeNo, title, content, privacy_settings AS privacySettings, user_id AS userId, add_date AS addDate FROM notice ORDER BY add_date DESC, notice_no DESC
SELECT notice_no AS noticeNo, title, content, privacy_settings AS privacySettings, user_id AS userId, add_date AS addDate FROM notice WHERE notice_no = #{noticeNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice ( notice_no, title, content, add_date, privacy_settings, user_id ) VALUES ( notice_seq.NEXTVAL, #{title}, #{content}, SYSDATE, #{privacySettings}, #{userId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, privacy_settings = #{privacySettings}, update_date = SYSDATE WHERE notice_no = #{noticeNo} AND user_id = #{userId}
